text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we start training, I decide to speak to Fine
Motion about today's agenda. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I know! Let's go for something different today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Because it'll be more fun! I assume you're capable
of adjusting the agenda?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've already come up with an idea. ♪ Right, let's
get started right away!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now, if memory serves, when making requests, it's best
to say...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Not quite there, huh? Okay, let's try a
different approach...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahem! You there. You truly mean to ignore my wishes?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you're unwilling to listen to what I have to say...
then I shall go ahead and pout. Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yay! Come on then, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we end up going with Fine Motion's
training agenda.
